arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim insists he never spoke to Manchester City about manager’s job
arts.sum: Amorim was linked with City amid Guardiola uncertainty Manchester United manager faces first derby on Sunday Ruben Amorim has insisted he never spoke to Manchester City about becoming Pep Guardiola’s replacement as the Manchester United head coach prepares for his first derby game in charge. The 39-year-old established himself as one of Europe’s finest up-and-coming coaches with his transformational work at the Portuguese champions, Sporting. United quickly moved to appoint Amorim after sacking Erik ten Hag in late October, when he had been linked to City amid uncertainty over Guardiola’s future. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: ‘A very small team’ – PSG manager Luis Enrique makes Manchester City jibe ahead of Champions League encounter
arts.sum: The UEFA Champions League tie between Manchester City and Paris Saint-Germain is finely poised. PSG are currently 25th and on course for a shock elimination at the revamped ‘League Phase’…

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs. Manchester United: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Man City and Man Utd, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Manager warns players they won’t be getting Manchester City transfers if results don’t improve
arts.sum: Sporting Club de Portugal manager João Pereira has warned his players they need to up their game significantly, or none of them will be getting the moves to Manchester City that some are expecting for them. arts.ttl: Barcelona set Rashford stance after Man Utd price reveal
arts.sum: Barcelona are 'attentive' to Marcus Rashford's situation but do not consider him a priority at the moment, according to Spanish media. Barcelona set Rashford stance after Man Utd price reveal
